calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Vacated

PROGRESS REPORT PROOF OF DEPOSIT OF MONEY INTO A BLOCKED ACCOUNT.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2023 Off Calendar

EXPEDITED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF COMPROMISE OF CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-22-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Claim or Action of the Minor, Matteo Calzolai.

Dept. 514 Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: R. Sahatjian. Proceeding reported by "for the Record" Commencing at 09:47:45 and recessed at 09:47:29 Reconvenes at 11:14:12, Ends at 11:39:20.

Pevel Krepkiy, Esq #269855 appearing by Zoom for Plaintiffs Carolyn Gonzales and Matteo Calzolai (minor who is not present). Plaintiff Carolyn Gonzalez is also present via Zoom is sworn in

Franco Calzolai, Guardian ad Litem, is present and is sworn in and testified.
Order appointing Franco Calzolai Guardian ad Litem was filed by the Court on Nov-21-2021

Nerrissa Dyett, Esq, #342567, is appearing by Zoom for Defendant John Lombond.

Stephen Mazzara, Esq., #251849 is appearing by Zoom for Defendant Uber.

The Honorable Michelle Tong give disclosure regarding her interests in Uber. Parties submitted to the Court a signed Waiver of Disqualification pursuant to CCP 170.3 (b)(1) which are lodge by the Court.

On the basis of the evidences received, good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the

Compromise is approved as follows:
Settlement amount - $26,000.00
Medical Bills - $950.68
Costs - $852.04
Attorney fees - $7985.10

The Balance of $16,212.18 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 821 Marina Village Parkway, Alameda, CA 94501. No withdrawal shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches 18 years of age.

Counsel for the Plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Orders Approving the Compromise and to Deposit Money into the Blocked Account and submit the same to the Court for review and signature.

Matter is continued to Mar-22-2023 at 09:00 am in Dept. 505 for a Progress report on the Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account.
